articlesConsidered.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS

article.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try

harvestedTerms.summary: Google Translate 20th anniversary article covers its evolution from statistical ML to neural networks and current Gemini/TPU-powered translation, plus new pronunciation practice feature. References TPU hardware, statistical machine translation, neural machine translation, and live translation. Limited novel AI terminology for graph purposes.

article.title: OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS

harvestedTerms.summary: OpenAI and AWS announce an expanded strategic partnership bringing OpenAI models (including GPT-5.5), Codex, and a new Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents offering to AWS enterprise customers. The article introduces 'Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents' as a distinct named product for deploying agents within AWS infrastructure, and re-surfaces GPT-5.5 and the concept of managed/hosted agent infrastructure.

OpenAI announces FedRAMP 20x Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and API Platform, enabling U.S. federal agencies to use frontier AI tools including GPT-5.5 and Codex in secure government environments. The article introduces FedRAMP 20x as a cloud-native, faster authorization path and describes government use cases spanning research, drafting, translation, and software development.

Anthropic announces Claude for Creative Work, launching connectors with Blender, Adobe, Autodesk, Ableton, Splice and others, plus educational partnerships with RISD, Ringling, and Goldsmiths. The article prominently features Claude Design and creative-pipeline use cases including code generation, asset bridging, and rapid prototyping.
